brief.para: Store single 2-element structure from one lane of two registers

authored.para: This instruction stores a 2-element structure to memory from corresponding elements of two SIMD&FP registers.
Depending on the settings in the CPACR_EL1, CPTR_EL2, and CPTR_EL3 registers, and the current Security state and Exception level, an attempt to execute the instruction might be trapped.

operationalnote_content.para: This instruction is a data-independent-time instruction as described in About PSTATE.DIT.

a.hover: Is the name of the first or only SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the name of the second SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded as "Rt" plus 1 modulo 32.
For the "8-bit", "8-bit, immediate offset", and "8-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q:S:size".
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the name of the first or only SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the name of the second SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded as "Rt" plus 1 modulo 32.
For the "16-bit", "16-bit, immediate offset", and "16-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q:S:size<1>".
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the name of the first or only SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the name of the second SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded as "Rt" plus 1 modulo 32.
For the "32-bit", "32-bit, immediate offset", and "32-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q:S".
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the name of the first or only SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the name of the second SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded as "Rt" plus 1 modulo 32.
For the "64-bit", "64-bit, immediate offset", and "64-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q".
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.

ps.name: A64.ldst.asisdlso.ST2_asisdlso_B2_2b

a.hover: Is the name of the first or only SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the name of the second SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded as "Rt" plus 1 modulo 32.
For the "8-bit", "8-bit, immediate offset", and "8-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q:S:size".
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.

Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose post-index register, excluding XZR, encoded in the "Rm" field.

For the "64-bit", "64-bit, immediate offset", and "64-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q".

ps.name: A64.ldst.asisdlsop.ST2_asisdlsop_B2_i2b

explanation.enclist: ST2_asisdlso_B2_2b, ST2_asisdlso_H2_2h, ST2_asisdlso_S2_2s, ST2_asisdlso_D2_2d, ST2_asisdlsop_B2_i2b, ST2_asisdlsop_BX2_r2b, ST2_asisdlsop_H2_i2h, ST2_asisdlsop_HX2_r2h, ST2_asisdlsop_S2_i2s, ST2_asisdlsop_SX2_r2s, ST2_asisdlsop_D2_i2d, ST2_asisdlsop_DX2_r2d

intro.para: Is the name of the first or only SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.

explanation.enclist: ST2_asisdlso_B2_2b, ST2_asisdlso_H2_2h, ST2_asisdlso_S2_2s, ST2_asisdlso_D2_2d, ST2_asisdlsop_B2_i2b, ST2_asisdlsop_BX2_r2b, ST2_asisdlsop_H2_i2h, ST2_asisdlsop_HX2_r2h, ST2_asisdlsop_S2_i2s, ST2_asisdlsop_SX2_r2s, ST2_asisdlsop_D2_i2d, ST2_asisdlsop_DX2_r2d

intro.para: Is the name of the second SIMD&FP register to be transferred, encoded as "Rt" plus 1 modulo 32.
For the "8-bit", "8-bit, immediate offset", and "8-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q:S:size".
For the "16-bit", "16-bit, immediate offset", and "16-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q:S:size<1>".
For the "32-bit", "32-bit, immediate offset", and "32-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q:S".
For the "64-bit", "64-bit, immediate offset", and "64-bit, register offset" variants: is the element index, encoded in "Q".

explanation.enclist: ST2_asisdlso_B2_2b, ST2_asisdlso_H2_2h, ST2_asisdlso_S2_2s, ST2_asisdlso_D2_2d, ST2_asisdlsop_B2_i2b, ST2_asisdlsop_BX2_r2b, ST2_asisdlsop_H2_i2h, ST2_asisdlsop_HX2_r2h, ST2_asisdlsop_S2_i2s, ST2_asisdlsop_SX2_r2s, ST2_asisdlsop_D2_i2d, ST2_asisdlsop_DX2_r2d

intro.para: Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose post-index register, excluding XZR, encoded in the "Rm" field.

ps.name: A64.ldst.asisdlso.ST2_asisdlso_B2_2b
A64.ldst.asisdlso.ST2_asisdlso_B2_2b
